SAMSE 0.0.0.9007
  • Reference

Import BAM Operating Models

Import_OMs.Rd

Imports one or more stock Operating Models (OMs) from BAM (Beaufort Assessment Model) output via MSEtool::ImportBAM(), optionally validates them against BAM population dynamics with MSEtool::CompareBAM(), and saves each OM to disk as a .om file.

Usage

Import_OMs(
  Import_Stocks = NULL,
  Compare = TRUE,
  plot = FALSE,
  OMpath = "Objects/OM/SingleStock"
)

Arguments

Import_Stocks

character. Names of stocks to import. If NULL (default), all stocks defined in BAM_Specs

Compare

logical. If TRUE (default), runs MSEtool::CompareBAM() on each imported OM to validate against BAM reference points.

plot

logical. If TRUE, diagnostic plots are produced during MSEtool::CompareBAM(). Passed directly to that function. Defaults to FALSE.

OMpath

character. Directory where .om files are saved. Defaults to "Objects/OM/SingleStock".

Value

Called for its side effects. Each imported OM is saved to OMpath as <StockName>.om. Returns NULL invisibly.

Details

Project-wide settings nSim, pYear) are loaded at the start of the function via Settings(). Each stock's BAM configuration is drawn from BAM_Specs.

See also

Settings(), MSEtool::ImportBAM(), MSEtool::CompareBAM()
